evidence_summary: Alternatives were present: 98 scored alternative opportunities and 90 ok hypothesis frames.
Alternatives were scored and rejected by lower_topology_selection_score, not by a validity failure.
Primary_route dominated route selection and all 33 topology-command influence steps; rejected scored alternatives consistently lost on topology selection score.
Topology command influenced 33 steps, so topology was active in the diagnostic case even though it inherited primary_route.
Issue #2393 names topology_hypothesis_near_parity_diversity_gate_v0 as the next diagnostic-only revision candidate.
